column1: # Album fixtures for the App Store demo server. Tab-separated. Two
# sources, two row shapes — `source` controls which downloader path
#   source_id      Musopen album slug (musopen) OR archive.org item id
#                  (archive_org_78). Used to build the download URL.
#   mb_release_id  MusicBrainz release MBID. Used by link-fixtures.sh
#                  to pin the catalog match. Leave blank to fall back
#   artist         Display artist (used as the artist subdir).
#   album          Display album title (used as the album subdir).
# Lines beginning with '#' or blank are ignored.
# Mix targets BPM bands the dance-preset advanced-search uses:
#   - Strauss waltzes  → Slow Waltz / Viennese Waltz presets
# Plus the classical-staples baseline so the music landing page has a

column4: Louis Armstrong and His Hot Five
